blended.narrative: Blacktail Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.9 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 1,433 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 41".
